ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales revenue for the order */,
  "total_profit" REAL /* Total profit for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the order */,
  "order_total_discount" REAL /* Total discount applied to the order */,
  "order_tax" REAL /* Total tax amount for the order */,
  "order_return_status" TEXT /* Status of any returns for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered on the platform */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "base_margin" REAL /* Base margin for the product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "product_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "item_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the specific item */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the specific item */,
  "item_total" REAL /* Total cost of the item including tax and discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_providers" (
  "shipping_provider_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each shipping provider */,
  "shipping_provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the shipping provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the shipping provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the shipping provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_shipping" (
  "order_shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order shipping record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the shipping record belongs to */,
  "shipping_provider_id" TEXT /* ID of the shipping provider used */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipping_shipping_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_provider_id") REFERENCES shipping_providers ("shipping_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category_map" (
  "product_category_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category map record */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "is_primary_category" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary category for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_map_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_map_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "customer_segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  "segment_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the segment image */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to define the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_map" (
  "customer_segment_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment map record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer segment */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer was added to the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_segment_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_map_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_map_customer_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("customer_segment_id")
)
